extarea.setAttribute(%22aria-label%22%2C%22REPL%20input%22)%2Ctextarea.setAttribute(%22aria-multiline%22%2C%22true%22)%2CinputRow.appendChild(prompt)%2CinputRow.appendChild(textarea)%2Cwrapper.appendChild(output)%2Cwrapper.appendChild(inputRow)%2Ccontainer.appendChild(wrapper)%3Bvar%20history%3D%5B%5D%2ChistoryIdx%3D-1%2CpendingInput%3D%22%22%3Bfunction%20autoResize()%7Btextarea.style.height%3D%22auto%22%2Ctextarea.style.height%3DMath.min(textarea.scrollHeight%2C120)%2B%22px%22%7Dfunction%20createTreeNode(value%2Ckey%2Cdepth%2CisLast)%7Bdepth%3Ddepth%7C%7C0%3Bvar%20el%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bif(el.style.cssText%3D%22padding-left%3A%22%2B16*depth%2B%22px%3Bline-height%3A20px%3Bwhite-space%3Apre%3B%22%2Cnull%3D%3D%3Dvalue)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(%22null%22%2C%22%238888aa%22)%2Cel%3Bif(void%200%3D%3D%3Dvalue)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(%22undefined%22%2C%22%238888aa%22)%2Cel%3Bvar%20type%3Dtypeof%20value%3Bif(%22string%22%3D%3D%3Dtype)%7Bvar%20display%3DJSON.stringify(value)%3Breturn%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(display%2C%22%2380d080%22)%2Cel%7Dif(%22number%22%3D%3D%3Dtype)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(String(value)%2C%22%2300e5ff%22)%2Cel%3Bif(%22boolean%22%3D%3D%3Dtype)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(String(value)%2C%22%23ff2975%22)%2Cel%3Bif(%22function%22%3D%3D%3Dtype)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(%22f%20%22%2B(value.name%7C%7C%22anonymous%22)%2B%22()%22%2C%22%237090d0%22)%2Cel%3Bvar%20keys%2CisArray%3DArray.isArray(value)%3Btry%7Bkeys%3DObject.keys(value)%7Dcatch(_)%7Bkeys%3D%5B%5D%7Dvar%20preview%3DisArray%3F%22Array(%22%2Bvalue.length%2B%22)%22%3A(value.constructor%26%26%22Object%22!%3D%3Dvalue.constructor.name%3Fvalue.constructor.name%2B%22%20%22%3A%22%22)%2B%22%7B%22%2Bkeys.slice(0%2C3).join(%22%2C%20%22)%2B(keys.length%3E3%3F%22%2C%20%E2%80%A6%22%3A%22%22)%2B%22%7D%22%3Bif(depth%3E%3D4%7C%7C0%3D%3D%3Dkeys.length)return%20el.innerHTML%3D(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(preview%2C%22%238888aa%22)%2Cel%3Bvar%20toggle%3Ddocument.createElement(%22span%22)%3Btoggle.style.cssText%3D%22cursor%3Apointer%3Buser-select%3Anone%3B%22%2Ctoggle.innerHTML%3D'%3Cspan%20style%3D%22color%3A%238888aa%3Bfont-size%3A10px%3B%22%3E%E2%96%B6%3C%2Fspan%3E%20'%2B(void%200!%3D%3Dkey%3FcolorSpan(JSON.stringify(key)%2C%22%23b967ff%22)%2B%22%3A%20%22%3A%22%22)%2BcolorSpan(preview%2C%22%238888aa%22)%3Bvar%20childContainer%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3BchildContainer.style.display%3D%22none%22%3Bvar%20expanded%3D!1%2CchildrenRendered%3D!1%3Breturn%20toggle.addEventListener(%22click%22%2Cfunction()%7Bif(expanded%3D!expanded%2C!childrenRendered)%7BchildrenRendered%3D!0%3Bfor(var%20limit%3DMath.min(isArray%3Fvalue.length%3Akeys.length%2C100)%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Climit%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20k%3DisArray%3Fi%3Akeys%5Bi%5D%2Cv%3Dvalue%5Bk%5D%3BchildContainer.appendChild(createTreeNode(v%2Ck%2Cdepth%2B1))%7Dif((isArray%3Fvalue.length%3Akeys.length)%3Elimit)%7Bvar%20more%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Bmore.style.cssText%3D%22padding-left%3A%22%2B16*(depth%2B1)%2B%22px%3Bcolor%3A%238888aa%3B%22%2Cmore.textContent%3D%22%E2%80%A6%20%22%2B((isArray%3Fvalue.length%3Akeys.length)-limit)%2B%22%20more%22%2CchildContainer.appendChild(more)%7D%7DchildContainer.style.display%3Dexpanded%3F%22block%22%3A%22none%22%2Ctoggle.querySelector(%22span%22).textContent%3Dexpanded%3F%22%E2% .bind()%2Cinfo%3Afunction()%7B%7D.bind()%7D%2Ccolors%3D%7Blog%3A%22%23e0e0ff%22%2Cinfo%3A%22%237090d0%22%2Cwarn%3A%22%23d0a040%22%2Cerror%3A%22%23e04040%22%7D%2Cprefixes%3D%7Blog%3A%22%22%2Cinfo%3A%22%E2%84%B9%20%22%2Cwarn%3A%22%E2%9A%A0%20%22%2Cerror%3A%22%E2%9C%96%20%22%7D%2Cintercepted%3D%7B%7D%2C%5B%22log%22%2C%22info%22%2C%22warn%22%2C%22error%22%5D.forEach(function(level)%7Bintercepted%5Blevel%5D%3Dfunction()%7Bvar%20args%3DArray.prototype.slice.call(arguments)%3Bif(1%3D%3D%3Dargs.length%26%26%22object%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20args%5B0%5D%26%26null!%3D%3Dargs%5B0%5D)%7Bvar%20label%3Ddocument.createElement(%22div%22)%3Blabel.style.cssText%3D%22color%3A%22%2Bcolors%5Blevel%5D%2B%22%3Bline-height%3A20px%3B%22%2Cprefixes%5Blevel%5D%26%26(label.textContent%3Dprefixes%5Blevel%5D)%2CappendEntry(label)%2CappendResult(args%5B0%5D)%7Delse%20appendText(prefixes%5Blevel%5D%2Bargs.map(function(a)%7Bif(%22object%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20a)try%7Breturn%20JSON.stringify(a)%7Dcatch(_)%7Breturn%20String(a)%7Dreturn%20String(a)%7D).join(%22%20%22)%2Ccolors%5Blevel%5D)%3Boriginal%5Blevel%5D.apply(console%2Cargs)%7D%7D)%2C%7Bintercepted%3Aintercepted%2Coriginal%3Aoriginal%7D)%2CsavedConsole%3D%7B%7D%3B%5B%22log%22%2C%22info%22%2C%22warn%22%2C%22error%22%5D.forEach(function(level)%7BsavedConsole%5Blevel%5D%3Dconsole%5Blevel%5D%2Cconsole%5Blevel%5D%3Dconsoles.intercepted%5Blevel%5D%7D)%3Btry%7Bvar%20fn%3Btry%7Bfn%3Dnew%20Function(%22data%22%2C%22df%22%2C%22rows%22%2C%22headers%22%2C%22meta%22%2C%22window%22%2C%22return%20(%22%2Bcode%2B%22)%22)%7Dcatch(_)%7Bfn%3Dnew%20Function(%22data%22%2C%22df%22%2C%22rows%22%2C%22headers%22%2C%22meta%22%2C%22window%22%2Ccode)%7Dvar%20result%3Dfn(ctx.data%2Cctx.data%2Cctx.rows%2Cctx.headers%2Cctx.meta%2Cwindow)%3Bvoid%200!%3D%3Dresult%26%26(appendResult(result)%2Cfunction(value)%7Bvar%20prev%3Doutput.querySelector(%22.dk-repl-export-bar%22)%3Bif(prev%26%26prev.parentNode.removeChild(prev)%2Cnull!%3Dvalue%26%26%22object%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20value)%7Bvar%20bar%3Ddocumen )%3Belse%20for(var%20tdCells%3DheaderRow.querySelectorAll(%22td%22)%2Ct%3D0%3Bt%3CtdCells.length%3Bt%2B%2B)headers.push(tdCells%5Bt%5D.textContent.trim())%7Dvar%20allRows%3D(table.querySelector(%22tbody%22)%7C%7Ctable).querySelectorAll(%22tr%22)%2CstartIdx%3D0%3B!table.querySelector(%22thead%22)%26%26allRows.length%3E0%26%26allRows%5B0%5D%3D%3D%3DheaderRow%26%26(startIdx%3D1)%3Bfor(var%20r%3DstartIdx%3Br%3CallRows.length%3Br%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20cells%3DallRows%5Br%5D.querySelectorAll(%22td%22)%3Bif(0!%3D%3Dcells.length)%7Bfor(var%20row%3D%5B%5D%2Cc%3D0%3Bc%3Ccells.length%3Bc%2B%2B)row.push(cells%5Bc%5D.textContent.trim())%3Brows.push(row)%7D%7Dif(0%3D%3D%3Dheaders.length%26%26rows.length%3E0)for(var%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Crows%5B0%5D.length%3Bi%2B%2B)headers.push(%22Column%20%22%2B(i%2B1))%3Breturn%7Bheaders%3Aheaders%2Crows%3Arows%7D%7Dfunction%20findTable(el)%7Bfor(var%20current%3Del%3Bcurrent%26%26current!%3D%3Ddocument.body%3B)%7Bif(%22TABLE%22%3D%3D%3Dcurrent.tagName)return%20current%3Bcurrent%3Dcurrent.parentElement%7Dreturn%20null%7Dwindow.WDK%3Dwindow.WDK%7C%7C%7B%7D%2Cwindow.WDK.createDOMScraper%3Dfunction(onData)%7Bvar%20active%3D!1%2ClastHighlighted%3Dnull%3Bfunction%20onMouseOver(e)%7Bvar%20table%3DfindTable(e.target)%3BlastHighlighted%26%26lastHighlighted!%3D%3Dtable%26%26lastHighlighted.classList.remove(HIGHLIGHT_CLASS)%2Ctable%26%26(table.classList.add(HIGHLIGHT_CLASS)%2ClastHighlighted%3Dtable)%7Dfunction%20onMouseOut(e)%7Bvar%20table%3DfindTable(e.target)%3Btable%26%26table.classList.remove(HIGHLIGHT_CLASS)%2ClastHighlighted%3D%3D%3Dtable%26%26(lastHighlighted%3Dnull)%7Dfunction%20onClick(e)%7Be.preventDefault()%2Ce.stopPropagation()%3Bvar%20table%3DfindTable(e.target)%3Bif(table)%7BlastHighlighted%26%26(lastHighlighted.classList.remove(HIGHLIGHT_CLASS)%2ClastHighlighted%3Dnull)%3Bvar%20data%3DtableToDataFrame(table)%3B%22function%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20onData%26%26onData(data)%7D%7Dreturn%7BstartSelect%3Afunction()%7Bactive%7C%7C(active%3D!0%2Cfunction()%7Bif(!documen ring%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20val)return%20val.length%3Btry%7Breturn%20JSON.stringify(val).length%7Dcatch(e)%7Breturn%200%7D%7Dreturn%20OrigXHR.prototype.open%3Dfunction(method%2Curl)%7Breturn%20this._dk_method%3Dmethod%2Cthis._dk_url%3Durl%2Cthis._dk_startTime%3DDate.now()%2CorigOpen.apply(this%2Carguments)%7D%2COrigXHR.prototype.send%3Dfunction()%7Bvar%20xhr%3Dthis%3Breturn%20this.addEventListener(%22loadend%22%2Cfunction()%7Bvar%20contentType%3D%22%22%3Btry%7BcontentType%3Dxhr.getResponseHeader(%22content-type%22)%7C%7C%22%22%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dvar%20responseBody%3D%22%22%3Btry%7BresponseBody%3Dxhr.responseText%7C%7C%22%22%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7DaddEntry(%7Btype%3A%22xhr%22%2Curl%3Axhr._dk_url%2Cmethod%3A(xhr._dk_method%7C%7C%22GET%22).toUpperCase()%2Cstatus%3Axhr.status%2CcontentType%3AcontentType%2Csize%3AsafeStringLength(responseBody)%2Ctiming%3ADate.now()-(xhr._dk_startTime%7C%7CDate.now())%2CresponseBody%3AresponseBody%2CparsedJSON%3AtryParseJSON(responseBody%2CcontentType)%2Ctimestamp%3A(new%20Date).toISOString()%7D)%7D)%2CorigSend.apply(this%2Carguments)%7D%2Cwindow.fetch%3Dfunction()%7Bvar%20args%3Darguments%2Curl%3D%22%22%2Cmethod%3D%22GET%22%3B%22string%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20args%5B0%5D%3Furl%3Dargs%5B0%5D%3Aargs%5B0%5D%26%26%22string%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20args%5B0%5D.url%26%26(url%3Dargs%5B0%5D.url%2Cmethod%3Dargs%5B0%5D.method%7C%7C%22GET%22)%2Cargs%5B1%5D%26%26args%5B1%5D.method%26%26(method%3Dargs%5B1%5D.method)%3Bvar%20startTime%3DDate.now()%3Breturn%20origFetch.apply(window%2Cargs).then(function(response)%7Breturn%20response.clone().text().then(function(body)%7Bvar%20contentType%3Dresponse.headers.get(%22content-type%22)%7C%7C%22%22%3BaddEntry(%7Btype%3A%22fetch%22%2Curl%3Aurl%2Cmethod%3Amethod.toUpperCase()%2Cstatus%3Aresponse.status%2CcontentType%3AcontentType%2Csize%3Abody.length%2Ctiming%3ADate.now()-startTime%2CresponseBody%3Abody%2CparsedJSON%3AtryParseJSON(body%2CcontentType)%2Ctimestamp%3A(new%20Date).toISOString()%7D)%7D).catch(function()%7B%7D)%2Cresponse%7D)%7D%2C%7BgetLog%3Afunction()%7Breturn%20log.slice()%7D%2Cclear%3Afunction()%7Blog%3D%5B%5D%7D%2Cstop%3Afunction()%7Bstopped%3D!0%2COrigXHR.prototype.open%3DorigOpen%2COrigXHR.prototype.send%3DorigSend%2Cwindow.fetch%3DorigFetch%7D%2ConRequest%3Afunction(callback)%7B%22function%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20callback%26%26callbacks.push(callback)%7D%7D%7D%2Cfunction()%7Bfunction%20readStorage(storage)%7Bvar%20pairs%3D%5B%5D%3Btry%7Bfor(var%20i%3D0%3Bi%3Cstorage.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20key%3Dstorage.key(i)%3Bpairs.push(%7Bkey%3Akey%2Cvalue%3Astorage.getItem(key)%7C%7C%22%22%7D)%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7B%7Dreturn%20pairs%7Dwindow.WDK%3Dwindow.WDK%7C%7C%7B%7D%2Cwindow.WDK.captureStorage%3Dfunction()%7Bfor(var%20rows%3D%5B%5D%2Ccookies%3Dfunction()%7Bvar%20pairs%3D%5B%5D%2Craw%3Ddocument.cookie%3Bif(!raw)return%20pairs%3Bfor(var%20parts%3Draw.split(%22%3B%22)%2Ci%3D0%3Bi%3Cparts.length%3Bi%2B%2B)%7Bvar%20part%3Dparts%5Bi%5D.trim()%3Bif(part)%7Bvar%20eqIdx%3Dpart.indexOf(%22%3D%22)%3B-1%3D%3D%3DeqIdx%3Fpairs.push(%7Bkey%3Apart%2Cvalue%3A%22%22%7D)%3Apairs.push(%7Bkey%3Apart.substring(0%2CeqIdx).trim()%2Cvalue%3Apart.substring(eqIdx%2B1).trim()%7D)%7D%7Dreturn%20pairs%7D()%2Cc%3D0%3Bc%3Ccookies.length%3Bc%2B%2B)rows.push(%5B%22cookie%22%2Ccookies%5Bc%5D.key%2Ccookies%5Bc%5D.value%5D)%3Bfor(var%20local%3DreadStorage(window.localStorage)%2Cl%3D0%3Bl%3Clocal.length%3Bl%2B%2B)rows.push(%5B%22localStorage%22%2Clocal%5Bl%5D.key%2Clocal%5Bl%5D.value%5D)%3Bfor(var%20session%3DreadStorage(window.sessionStorage)%2Cs%3D0%3Bs%3Csession.length%3Bs%2B%2B)rows.push(%5B%22sessionStorage%22%2Csession%5Bs%5D.key%2Csession%5Bs%5D.value%5D)%3Breturn%7Bheaders%3A%5B%22source%22%2C%22key%22%2C%22value%22%5D%2Crows%3Arows%7D%7D%7D()%2Cfunction()%7Bfunction%20stringify(arg)%7Bif(void%200%3D%3D%3Darg)return%22undefined%22%3Bif(null%3D%3D%3Darg)return%22null%22%3Bif(%22string%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20arg)return%20arg%3Bif(arg%20instanceof%20Error)return%20arg.stack%7C%7Carg.message%7C%7CString(arg)%3Btry%7Breturn%20JSON.stringify(ar 9%7D%5Cs%2B%5Cd%7B1%2C2%7D%2C%3F%5Cs%2B%5Cd%7B4%7D%24%2F%5D%2CBOOLEAN_VALUES%3Dnew%20Set(%5B%22true%22%2C%22false%22%2C%22yes%22%2C%22no%22%2C%221%22%2C%220%22%2C%22t%22%2C%22f%22%2C%22y%22%2C%22n%22%5D)%3Bfunction%20isNumeric(s)%7Bif(%22string%22!%3Dtypeof%20s)return!1%3Bconst%20trimmed%3Ds.trim()%3Breturn%22%22!%3D%3Dtrimmed%26%26!isNaN(Number(trimmed))%26%26isFinite(Number(trimmed))%7Dfunction%20isDate(s)%7Bif(%22string%22!%3Dtypeof%20s)return!1%3Bconst%20trimmed%3Ds.trim()%3Bif(%22%22%3D%3D%3Dtrimmed)return!1%3Bif(DATE_PATTERNS.some(p%3D%3Ep.test(trimmed)))%7Bconst%20d%3Dnew%20Date(trimmed)%3Breturn!isNaN(d.getTime())%7Dreturn!1%7Dfunction%20isBoolean(s)%7Breturn%22string%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20s%26%26BOOLEAN_VALUES.has(s.trim().toLowerCase())%7Dfunction%20parseFilterExpr(expr)%7Bif(!expr%7C%7C%22%22%3D%3D%3Dexpr)return%20null%3Bif(%22~%22%3D%3D%3Dexpr.charAt(0))%7Bvar%20pattern%3Dexpr.substring(1)%3Btry%7Bvar%20re%3Dnew%20RegExp(pattern%2C%22i%22)%3Breturn%20function(val)%7Breturn%20re.test(null%3D%3Dval%3F%22%22%3AString(val))%7D%7Dcatch(e)%7Breturn%20null%7D%7Dif(%22!%22%3D%3D%3Dexpr.charAt(0)%26%26%22%3D%22!%3D%3Dexpr.charAt(1))%7Bvar%20neg%3Dexpr.substring(1).toLowerCase()%3Breturn%20function(val)%7Breturn-1%3D%3D%3D(null%3D%3Dval%3F%22%22%3AString(val).toLowerCase()).indexOf(neg)%7D%7Dvar%20numMatch%3Dexpr.match(%2F%5E(%3E%3D%7C%3C%3D%7C!%3D%7C%3E%7C%3C%7C%3D)%5Cs*(.%2B)%24%2F)%3Bif(numMatch)%7Bvar%20op%3DnumMatch%5B1%5D%2Cnum%3DparseFloat(numMatch%5B2%5D)%3Bif(!isNaN(num))return%20function(val)%7Bvar%20n%3DparseFloat(val)%3Bif(isNaN(n))return!1%3Bswitch(op)%7Bcase%22%3E%22%3Areturn%20n%3Enum%3Bcase%22%3C%22%3Areturn%20n%3Cnum%3Bcase%22%3E%3D%22%3Areturn%20n%3E%3Dnum%3Bcase%22%3C%3D%22%3Areturn%20n%3C%3Dnum%3Bcase%22%3D%22%3Areturn%20n%3D%3D%3Dnum%3Bcase%22!%3D%22%3Areturn%20n!%3D%3Dnum%3Bdefault%3Areturn!0%7D%7D%7Dvar%20lower%3Dexpr.toLowerCase()%3Breturn%20function(val)%7Breturn-1!%3D%3D(null%3D%3Dval%3F%22%22%3AString(val).toLowerCase()).indexOf(lower)%7D%7Df %7Brender(newDataFrame)%7D%2CgetFilterState%3Afunction()%7Breturn%20JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(filterState))%7D%7D%7Dfunction%20main()%7Bif(%22function%22!%3Dtypeof%20initWDK)%7Bvar%20panel%3Dfunction()%7B!function()%7Bif(!document.getElementById(%22dk-panel-styles%22))%7Bvar%20style%3Ddocument.createElement(%22style%22)%3Bstyle.id%3D%22dk-panel-styles%22%2Cstyle.textContent%3D%5B%22.dk-panel%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%20top%3A%2060px%3B%20right%3A%2020px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20width%3A%20520px%3B%20height%3A%20420px%3B%20min-width%3A%20320px%3B%20min-height%3A%20220px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20%230a0a1a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border%3A%201px%20solid%20%232a2a4a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border-radius%3A%208px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20box-shadow%3A%200%204px%2032px%20rgba(0%2C%20229%2C%20255%2C%200.15)%2C%200%200%201px%20%2300e5ff%3B%22%2C%22%20%20z-index%3A%20999999%3B%22%2C%22%20%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20flex-direction%3A%20column%3B%22%2C'%20%20font-family%3A%20%22SF%20Mono%22%2C%20%22Fira%20Code%22%2C%20%22Cascadia%20Code%22%2C%20%22Consolas%22%2C%20monospace%3B'%2C%22%20%20font-size%3A%2013px%3B%20color%3A%20%23e0e0f0%3B%22%2C%22%20%20overflow%3A%20hidden%3B%20user-select%3A%20none%3B%22%2C%22%7D%22%2C%22.dk-panel.dk-hidden%20%7B%20display%3A%20none%3B%20%7D%22%2C%22.dk-titlebar%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20display%3A%20flex%3B%20align-items%3A%20center%3B%20justify-content%3A%20space-between%3B%22%2C%22%20%20padding%3A%206px%2010px%3B%20cursor%3A%20grab%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20linear-gradient(135deg%2C%20%2312122a%2C%20%230a0a1a)%3B%22%2C%22%20%20border-bottom%3A%201px%20solid%20%232a2a4a%3B%22%2C%22%20%20flex-shrink%3A%200%3B%22%2C%22%7D%22%2C%22.dk-titlebar%3Aactive%20%7B%20cursor%3A%20grabbing%3B%20%7D%22%2C%22.dk-title%20%7B%22%2C%22%20%20font-weight%3A%20700%3B%20font-size%3A%2013px%3B%20letter-spacing%3A%201px%3B%22%2C%22%20%20background%3A%20linear-gradient(90deg%2C%20%2300e5ff%2C%20%23b967ff)%3B%22%2C%22%20%20-webkit-background-clip%3A%20text%3B%20-webkit-tex
